meta.title: The Geopolitics of America's Shale Revolution - Europe Panel: Hannah Thoburn and Edward Chow
meta.description: This conference examines how U.S. oil and natural gas exports reshaped the balance of global energy power, with the Europe panel discussion between Hannah Thoburn and Edward Chow.
